changeSet.author: kanix
changeSet.comment: Add 'veteran' to contributor_milestone.milestone_type CHECK constraint for 500-unit milestone
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE contributor_milestone DROP CONSTRAINT ck_cm_milestone_type; ALTER TABLE contributor_milestone ADD CONSTRAINT ck_cm_milestone_type CHECK (milestone_type IN ('accepted_pr', 'royalty_activation', 'starter_kit', 'veteran'));

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE contributor_milestone DROP CONSTRAINT ck_cm_milestone_type; ALTER TABLE contributor_milestone ADD CONSTRAINT ck_cm_milestone_type CHECK (milestone_type IN ('accepted_pr', 'royalty_activation', 'starter_kit'));
